description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines two stages named security_release:create_versions and security_release:create_versions:start. Add a security_release_create_versions:start job in the start stage that runs the command bundle exec rake 'security:create_versions:start', has no dependencies, is manual, and is executed only when the pipeline source is pipeline, web, or api and the variable SECURITY_RELEASE_PIPELINE matches create_versions or true. Add a security_release_create_versions:create job in the create_versions stage that depends on the start job, runs bundle exec rake 'security:create_versions:create', and uses the same rule conditions. Both jobs inherit the common job setup and CI token configuration via .common-job-setup and .common-ci-tokens.
